file: 1286_Zhang 等 - 2020 - Role of acidity in catalytic cracking of n-decane over supported Pt-based catalysts.txt

experiments.description: 在Pt基催化剂（Pt/SiO2-Al2O3, Pt/MgO-Al2O3, Pt/SiO2, Pt/MgO-SiO2, Pt/MgO, Pt/Al2O3）上，于550-750°C和3.5 MPa条件下催化裂解正癸烷（n-decane），以研究催化剂酸性对裂解活性和结焦行为的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: the cracking of n-decane over the prepared catalyst coatings was carried out on tubular reactor apparatus... Reaction temperature... ranging from 550°C to 750 °C... and the quasi-steady state was maintained at least 5 min at each target temperature.

Product Selectivity.value: alkenes selectivity evaluated by the ratio of alkenes to alkanes (ene/ane)
Product Selectivity.original: alkenes selectivity evaluated by the ratio of alkenes to alkanes (ene/ane)

Catalyst stability.value: Catalyst deactivation due to coverage of active sites by coke deposition and carburization of Pt metals
Catalyst stability.original: Catalyst deactivation due to coverage of active sites by coke deposition and carburization of Pt metals
